mapper.sql: id, order_no, buyer_id, seller_id, goods_id, goods_title, goods_image, goods_price, quantity, total_amount, status, trade_type, trade_location, address, phone, remark, pay_time, delivery_time, finish_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (id, order_no, buyer_id, seller_id, goods_id, goods_title, goods_image, goods_price, quantity, total_amount, status, trade_type, trade_location, address, phone, remark, pay_time, delivery_time, finish_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderNo}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{goodsId}, #{goodsTitle}, #{goodsImage}, #{goodsPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{tradeType}, #{tradeLocation}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{remark}, #{payTime}, #{deliveryTime}, #{finishTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{cancelReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_order
status = #{status}, pay_time = #{payTime}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
